title: 12pc Professional Wood Carving Chisel Set Various Blades Woodworking Clay & Wax
description:
Whether you've just started dabbling in wood hobby projects or are already an expert, our Universal Tool Wood Carving Chisel Set is a must-have set of essentials for your workshop or crafting area. This professional quality set comes with 12 chisels, each featuring assorted tip shapes and sizes ideal for carving figures, details and designs into a variety of wood projects. Some of our favorite projects to create with these chisels are whittling whistles, crafting kitchen spoons, making letter openers and making ornaments! Each chisel has an overall length of 7.75" and comes with a tip protector sleeve. The chisels themselves are constructed of high-quality carbon steel and have wooden handles that will help prevent slippage during use

12pc Professional Wood Carving Chisel Set Various Blades Woodworking Clay & Wax

Whether you've just started dabbling in wood hobby projects or are already an expert, our Universal Tool Wood Carving Chisel Set is a must-have set of essentials for your workshop or crafting area.

Product Specifications

  • MPN: WCCS-1
  • UPC: 706569628005
  • Color: Black
  • Size: 13pc

This professional quality set comes with 12 chisels, each featuring assorted tip shapes and sizes ideal for carving figures, details and designs into a variety of wood projects. Some of our favorite projects to create with these chisels are whittling whistles, crafting kitchen spoons, making letter openers and making ornaments!

Each chisel has an overall length of 7.75" and comes with a tip protector sleeve. The chisels themselves are constructed of high-quality carbon steel and have wooden handles that will help prevent slippage during use. All of the chisels fit neatly inside of a PVC pouch that we've included so you can keep your tools organized when not in use. Make sure to grab a set of these for yourself whether you're a beginner or a seasoned wood crafter, or gift them to a friend who's a crafting enthusiast!
